message:
test(fuzz): add datetime/timedelta string parsing fuzz target

Fuzz UFuncArray::from_datetime_strings and from_timedelta_strings
with arbitrary UTF-8 input across various time units to catch edge
cases in datetime parsing logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,5 +33,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "datetime_parsing"
+path = "fuzz_targets/datetime_parsing.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
